theme: 3D print whose scaffolding must escape the cage
title: Escape the Cage: Extractable Support Scaffolding
strategies: trivial: print in the given orientation, drop a straight vertical support column beneath every overhang down to the first solid or the plate
greedy: try all 6 build directions, keep the one whose straight-column support uses the LEAST material (overhang minimisation) -- ignores whether that support can be removed

strong: score each build direction by ESCAPABLE shadow volume (material + a penalty for support with no line-of-sight extraction ray) and route supports along <=45-degree slopes toward open corridors so they can be pulled free
beyond strong: jointly optimise orientation and a branching support tree so nearly every voxel escapes while sharing trunks -- the true optimum is unknown
